verses.text: Hih thu za un, mi khempeuh aw! Ngai un, leitunga a teng khempeuh
Ka kam in pilna thu gen ding a, ka lungsim ngaihsutna kitelsiang ding hi
Paunak thu theihhak khat ka ngaihsun ding a, laia lasakna tawh a khiatna ka gentel ding hi
Haksat hun, hong bawlsiate' gitlohna in hong nen'cip ciangin bang hangin lau ding ka hi hiam
Mite in a hauhna uh muangin, tampi a neihna uh a kisaktheihpih hangun
amah leh amah a kitankhia tawmzo taktak, a nuntakna man ding Pasian' tungah a piazo mi kuamah omlo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a nuntakna tatna ding a man tam mahmah a, Leihawmpi mu ngeilo zah ding a hing tawntung dingin kitankhiazo ngeilo hi
Amah in a pilte nangawn a si mu ding a, a haite leh a teilote a kibangin sia-in, amau' neihsa khempeuh midangte' tungah nusiat uh hi
Amaute in leitangte amau' min a puaksak uh hangin hankhuk pen khang tawntung amau' omna hi ngitnget ding hi
Ama hauhna-ah mi kipsuak theilo a, a sithei ganhingte tawh a kibang lel ahi hi
Hih pen a kihai muan'te' ngah hi a, amau' ngahsa tawh a lungkimte' thumong ahi hi
Tua bangin amaute Leinuai-a dingin kiseh hi. Sihna pen amau a cingpa hi ding hi. Hankhuk sungah amaute tuaksuksuak ding uh a, a meel uh sia ding a, Leinuai, amau' inn hi ding hi
Ahih hangin Pasian in Leinuai' vangliatna panin kei hong honkhia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in kei hong sang ding hi
Mi khatpeuh a hauh ciang ahi a, a innkuan minthan'na a khan' ciang ahi zongin lau-in lunghihmawh dingin ngaihsun tuan kei in
Bang hang hiam cih leh a sih ciangin bangmah kenglo ding a, a minthan'na in amah zuisuklo ding hi
A hin' lai-in amah a lungdamin kingaihsunin, mi khat in ama-a' ding na a lim sep ciangin phatna a ngah hangin
khuavak a mu nawnlo dingin a si khinsa a pu a pate kiang mahah amah pai veve ding hi
Ama hauhna in mi hing paisuaksak theilo a, a sithei ganhingte tawh a kibang lel ahi hi.
